data.label: Gholdengo
data.description: A mischievous entity known for its golden form and corrupting influence.

data.label: Heart Scale
data.description: A rare scale said to hold sentimental value, now potentially tainted.

data.label: Destiny Knot
data.description: A mystical item that binds fates, now under a corrupting influence.

data.label: Heart Scales Girl Group
data.description: A musical group formed by Gholdengo, likely with a unique, perhaps unsettling, charm.

data.label: Lopunny
data.description: A graceful Pokémon, now a member of the Heart Scales Girl Group.

data.label: Meloetta
data.description: A melodic Pokémon, now a member of the Heart Scales Girl Group.

data.label: Pheromosa
data.description: An elegant Ultra Beast, now a member of the Heart Scales Girl Group.
